name: Donna Miller
data_note: Limited public information available. Check your county clerk's office or the Illinois State Board of Elections for filing info.
bio: Donna Miller is a Cook County Board Commissioner (District 6, south suburban Cook County, since 2018) running for the open IL-02 Congressional seat vacated by Robin Kelly. She is one of approximately 10 candidates in a crowded Democratic primary for a D+18 district covering the South Side of Chicago and south suburbs. (Source: WTTW Voter Guide 2026; Chicago Sun-Times; ILSOS filing confirmed)

jacket.note: FEC candidate totals pending ETL import.

donors.name: Jeremy Pava
donors.note: Previously gave at least $283,000 to AIPAC/UDP (2023–2025). Max contribution to Miller. Also gave max to Fine and Bean.

donors.name: Ann Pava
donors.note: Spouse of Jeremy Pava. Gave maximum donation mid-December 2025. AIPAC-linked donor.

donors.name: Jerry Bednyak
donors.note: In-state donor. Has given at least $1.1M to AIPAC and UDP. Max contribution to Miller.

donors.name: AIPAC-linked donor network (258+ donors)
donors.note: At least 258 individual donors who previously gave to AIPAC/UDP contributed ~$470K+ to Miller in Q4 2025, representing 36%+ of total fundraising. Not a single entity — FEC-documented via donor overlap analysis.

donors.name: Affordable Chicago Now (Super PAC)
donors.note: Pop-up super PAC organized Jan 2026 running TV ads supporting Miller. Donors currently undisclosed. Identified by The American Prospect as part of AIPAC stealth infrastructure.

red_flags.label: AIPAC-Linked Out-of-State Donor Network
red_flags.detail: 87% of Q4 2025 fundraising (~$892K) came from out-of-state donors. At least 258 of Miller's donors previously gave to AIPAC/UDP. A super PAC called 'Affordable Chicago Now' (donors undisclosed) is also running ads in her support. Miller's campaign denied soliciting AIPAC support but acknowledged accepting donations from known AIPAC contributors.

career_history.highlight: South suburban Cook County; stepping up to federal office

policy_platform.position: Cook County Commissioner since 2018, focusing on south suburban constituent services and county governance.

social_pulse.summary: No significant social media presence or public discourse found in available sources as of March 2026.

trust_indicators.label: Disclosure filings status
trust_indicators.value: Not confirmed in public sources as of March 2026
